ttsScript: Grateful. ɡreɪtfəl. Feeling or showing thanks for something good. I am grateful for your help during the project.. She felt grateful to have such supportive friends.

sections.text: Grateful
/ˈɡreɪt.fəl/
Feeling or showing thanks for something good
I am grateful for your help during the project.
She felt grateful to have such supportive friends.

ttsScript: Journey. dʒɜːrni. An act of traveling from one place to another. The journey from London to Paris takes about two hours by train.. Life is a journey, not a destination.

sections.text: Journey
/ˈdʒɜːr.ni/
An act of traveling from one place to another
The journey from London to Paris takes about two hours by train.
Life is a journey, not a destination.

ttsScript: Struggle. strʌɡəl. To try very hard to do something difficult. Many students struggle with mathematics at first.. She struggled to find the right words.

sections.text: Struggle
/ˈstrʌɡ.əl/
To try very hard to do something difficult
Many students struggle with mathematics at first.
She struggled to find the right words.

ttsScript: Curious. kjʊriəs. Having a strong desire to know or learn something. Children are naturally curious about the world around them.. I was curious to know what happened next.

sections.text: Curious
/ˈkjʊr.i.əs/
Having a strong desire to know or learn something
Children are naturally curious about the world around them.
I was curious to know what happened next.

ttsScript: Accomplish. əkɒmplɪʃ. To succeed in doing or completing something. She accomplished her goal of running a marathon.. What do you hope to accomplish this year?

sections.text: Accomplish
/əˈkɒm.plɪʃ/
To succeed in doing or completing something
She accomplished her goal of running a marathon.
What do you hope to accomplish this year?

ttsScript: Genuine. dʒenjuɪn. Truly what something is said to be; authentic and real. His apology seemed genuine and heartfelt.. She has a genuine interest in helping others.

sections.text: Genuine
/ˈdʒen.ju.ɪn/
Truly what something is said to be; authentic and real
His apology seemed genuine and heartfelt.
She has a genuine interest in helping others.

ttsScript: Hesitate. hezɪteɪt. To pause before saying or doing something, often due to uncertainty. Don't hesitate to ask if you need any help.. He hesitated for a moment before answering.

sections.text: Hesitate
/ˈhez.ɪ.teɪt/
To pause before saying or doing something, often due to uncertainty
Don't hesitate to ask if you need any help.
He hesitated for a moment before answering.

ttsScript: Remarkable. rɪmɑːrkəbəl. Worthy of attention; striking or extraordinary. She made remarkable progress in just six months.. The view from the mountain top was truly remarkable.

sections.text: Remarkable
/rɪˈmɑːr.kə.bəl/
Worthy of attention; striking or extraordinary
She made remarkable progress in just six months.
The view from the mountain top was truly remarkable.

ttsScript: Abandon. əbændən. To give up completely; to leave behind and never return to. They had to abandon the ship when it started sinking.. Never abandon your dreams, no matter how hard it gets.

sections.text: Abandon
/əˈbæn.dən/
To give up completely; to leave behind and never return to
They had to abandon the ship when it started sinking.
Never abandon your dreams, no matter how hard it gets.

ttsScript: Thrive. θraɪv. To grow, develop, or be successful. Plants thrive in warm and sunny conditions.. Some people thrive under pressure.

sections.text: Thrive
/θraɪv/
To grow, develop, or be successful
Plants thrive in warm and sunny conditions.
Some people thrive under pressure.

ttsScript: Negotiate. nɪɡoʊʃieɪt. To discuss something in order to reach an agreement. We need to negotiate the terms of the contract.. She negotiated a higher salary for the new position.

sections.text: Negotiate
/nɪˈɡoʊ.ʃi.eɪt/
To discuss something in order to reach an agreement
We need to negotiate the terms of the contract.
She negotiated a higher salary for the new position.

ttsScript: Deadline. dedlaɪn. The latest time by which something must be completed. The deadline for submitting the report is Friday.. We need to meet the deadline or we will lose the client.

sections.text: Deadline
/ˈded.laɪn/
The latest time by which something must be completed
The deadline for submitting the report is Friday.
We need to meet the deadline or we will lose the client.

ttsScript: Collaborate. kəlæbəreɪt. To work jointly with others on an activity or project. The two companies will collaborate on developing new technology.. Scientists from different countries collaborated on the research.

sections.text: Collaborate
/kəˈlæb.ə.reɪt/
To work jointly with others on an activity or project
The two companies will collaborate on developing new technology.
Scientists from different countries collaborated on the research.

ttsScript: Ambitious. æmbɪʃəs. Having a strong desire and determination to succeed. She is an ambitious young lawyer with plans to become a judge.. The company announced an ambitious expansion plan.

sections.text: Ambitious
/æmˈbɪʃ.əs/
Having a strong desire and determination to succeed
She is an ambitious young lawyer with plans to become a judge.
The company announced an ambitious expansion plan.

ttsScript: Delegate. delɪɡeɪt. To give a task or responsibility to another person. A good manager knows when to delegate tasks to the team.. She delegated the research work to her assistant.

sections.text: Delegate
/ˈdel.ɪ.ɡeɪt/
To give a task or responsibility to another person
A good manager knows when to delegate tasks to the team.
She delegated the research work to her assistant.

ttsScript: Mentor. mentɔːr. An experienced person who advises and helps someone less experienced. She found a mentor who guided her through her first year at work.. A good mentor can change the direction of your career.

sections.text: Mentor
/ˈmen.tɔːr/
An experienced person who advises and helps someone less experienced
She found a mentor who guided her through her first year at work.
A good mentor can change the direction of your career.

ttsScript: Innovative. ɪnəveɪtɪv. Introducing new ideas or methods; creative and original. The company is known for its innovative approach to design.. We need innovative solutions to tackle climate change.

sections.text: Innovative
/ˈɪn.ə.veɪ.tɪv/
Introducing new ideas or methods; creative and original
The company is known for its innovative approach to design.
We need innovative solutions to tackle climate change.

ttsScript: Resilient. rɪzɪliənt. Able to recover quickly from difficult conditions. The economy proved to be more resilient than expected.. Resilient people see failure as a learning opportunity.

sections.text: Resilient
/rɪˈzɪl.i.ənt/
Able to recover quickly from difficult conditions
The economy proved to be more resilient than expected.
Resilient people see failure as a learning opportunity.

ttsScript: Leverage. levərɪdʒ. To use something to maximum advantage. You should leverage your network to find new opportunities.. The startup leveraged social media to grow its customer base.

sections.text: Leverage
/ˈlev.ər.ɪdʒ/
To use something to maximum advantage
You should leverage your network to find new opportunities.
The startup leveraged social media to grow its customer base.

ttsScript: Feasible. fiːzəbəl. Possible and practical to do easily or conveniently. Is it feasible to finish the project by next month?. The plan sounds great, but is it financially feasible?

sections.text: Feasible
/ˈfiː.zə.bəl/
Possible and practical to do easily or conveniently
Is it feasible to finish the project by next month?
The plan sounds great, but is it financially feasible?

ttsScript: Overwhelmed. oʊvərwelmd. Feeling that something is too much to deal with. She felt overwhelmed by the amount of homework.. He was overwhelmed with gratitude after the surprise party.

sections.text: Overwhelmed
/ˌoʊ.vərˈwelmd/
Feeling that something is too much to deal with
She felt overwhelmed by the amount of homework.
He was overwhelmed with gratitude after the surprise party.

ttsScript: Anxious. æŋkʃəs. Feeling worried or nervous about something with an uncertain outcome. She was anxious about the job interview tomorrow.. The anxious wait for exam results can be stressful.

sections.text: Anxious
/ˈæŋk.ʃəs/
Feeling worried or nervous about something with an uncertain outcome
She was anxious about the job interview tomorrow.
The anxious wait for exam results can be stressful.

ttsScript: Empathy. empəθi. The ability to understand and share the feelings of another. A good leader shows empathy toward their team members.. Empathy is the foundation of meaningful relationships.

sections.text: Empathy
/ˈem.pə.θi/
The ability to understand and share the feelings of another
A good leader shows empathy toward their team members.
Empathy is the foundation of meaningful relationships.

ttsScript: Nostalgic. nɒstældʒɪk. Feeling a sentimental longing for the past. The old photograph made her feel nostalgic for her childhood.. He gets nostalgic whenever he hears that song.

sections.text: Nostalgic
/nɒˈstæl.dʒɪk/
Feeling a sentimental longing for the past
The old photograph made her feel nostalgic for her childhood.
He gets nostalgic whenever he hears that song.

ttsScript: Frustrated. frʌstreɪtɪd. Feeling upset or annoyed because of inability to change or achieve something. He was frustrated with the slow internet connection.. Students often feel frustrated when they cannot understand a concept.

sections.text: Frustrated
/ˈfrʌs.treɪ.tɪd/
Feeling upset or annoyed because of inability to change or achieve something
He was frustrated with the slow internet connection.
Students often feel frustrated when they cannot understand a concept.

ttsScript: Euphoric. juːfɒrɪk. Feeling intense excitement and happiness. The crowd was euphoric after the team won the championship.. She felt euphoric when she received the acceptance letter.

sections.text: Euphoric
/juːˈfɒr.ɪk/
Feeling intense excitement and happiness
The crowd was euphoric after the team won the championship.
She felt euphoric when she received the acceptance letter.

ttsScript: Melancholy. melənkɒli. A deep, persistent sadness or gloom. A sense of melancholy filled the room after the farewell.. The rainy weather added to his feeling of melancholy.

sections.text: Melancholy
/ˈmel.ən.kɒl.i/
A deep, persistent sadness or gloom
A sense of melancholy filled the room after the farewell.
The rainy weather added to his feeling of melancholy.

ttsScript: Contempt. kəntempt. The feeling that a person or thing is beneath consideration; worthless. She looked at the broken promise with contempt.. His voice was full of contempt when he spoke about the decision.

sections.text: Contempt
/kənˈtempt/
The feeling that a person or thing is beneath consideration; worthless
She looked at the broken promise with contempt.
His voice was full of contempt when he spoke about the decision.

ttsScript: Serenity. sɪrenɪti. The state of being calm, peaceful, and untroubled. The lake at sunrise offered a moment of perfect serenity.. Meditation helps her find inner serenity.

sections.text: Serenity
/sɪˈren.ɪ.ti/
The state of being calm, peaceful, and untroubled
The lake at sunrise offered a moment of perfect serenity.
Meditation helps her find inner serenity.

ttsScript: Resentment. rɪzentmənt. Bitter indignation at having been treated unfairly. Years of resentment had built up between the two brothers.. Holding onto resentment only hurts yourself.

sections.text: Resentment
/rɪˈzent.mənt/
Bitter indignation at having been treated unfairly
Years of resentment had built up between the two brothers.
Holding onto resentment only hurts yourself.

ttsScript: Hypothesis. haɪpɒθəsɪs. A proposed explanation made on the basis of limited evidence as a starting point. The scientist tested her hypothesis through a series of experiments.. Our hypothesis was proven correct by the data.

sections.text: Hypothesis
/haɪˈpɒθ.ə.sɪs/
A proposed explanation made on the basis of limited evidence as a starting point
The scientist tested her hypothesis through a series of experiments.
Our hypothesis was proven correct by the data.

ttsScript: Analyze. ænəlaɪz. To examine something in detail to understand it or explain it. We need to analyze the data before making any conclusions.. The detective analyzed the evidence carefully.

sections.text: Analyze
/ˈæn.əl.aɪz/
To examine something in detail to understand it or explain it
We need to analyze the data before making any conclusions.
The detective analyzed the evidence carefully.

ttsScript: Profound. prəfaʊnd. Very great or intense; having deep insight or understanding. The book had a profound impact on how I see the world.. She shared a profound observation about human nature.

sections.text: Profound
/prəˈfaʊnd/
Very great or intense; having deep insight or understanding
The book had a profound impact on how I see the world.
She shared a profound observation about human nature.

ttsScript: Coherent. koʊhɪrənt. Logical and consistent; easy to understand. Please present your argument in a coherent manner.. Despite being tired, she gave a coherent explanation.

sections.text: Coherent
/koʊˈhɪr.ənt/
Logical and consistent; easy to understand
Please present your argument in a coherent manner.
Despite being tired, she gave a coherent explanation.

ttsScript: Paradox. pærədɒks. A statement that contradicts itself but might still be true. It is a paradox that the busiest people often find the most time.. The grandfather paradox is a famous thought experiment in physics.

sections.text: Paradox
/ˈpær.ə.dɒks/
A statement that contradicts itself but might still be true
It is a paradox that the busiest people often find the most time.
The grandfather paradox is a famous thought experiment in physics.

ttsScript: Elaborate. ɪlæbəreɪt. To develop or present something in detail. Could you elaborate on your point about climate change?. The teacher asked him to elaborate on his answer.

sections.text: Elaborate
/ɪˈlæb.ər.eɪt/
To develop or present something in detail
Could you elaborate on your point about climate change?
The teacher asked him to elaborate on his answer.

ttsScript: Paradigm. pærədaɪm. A typical example or pattern of something; a model. The internet created a paradigm shift in how we communicate.. This discovery challenges the existing paradigm in biology.

sections.text: Paradigm
/ˈpær.ə.daɪm/
A typical example or pattern of something; a model
The internet created a paradigm shift in how we communicate.
This discovery challenges the existing paradigm in biology.

ttsScript: Empirical. ɪmpɪrɪkəl. Based on observation or experience rather than theory. The study provides empirical evidence for the new treatment.. We need empirical data to support our claims.

sections.text: Empirical
/ɪmˈpɪr.ɪ.kəl/
Based on observation or experience rather than theory
The study provides empirical evidence for the new treatment.
We need empirical data to support our claims.

ttsScript: Synthesize. sɪnθəsaɪz. To combine different ideas or things to form a coherent whole. The essay requires you to synthesize information from multiple sources.. Scientists synthesized the compound in the laboratory.

sections.text: Synthesize
/ˈsɪn.θə.saɪz/
To combine different ideas or things to form a coherent whole
The essay requires you to synthesize information from multiple sources.
Scientists synthesized the compound in the laboratory.

ttsScript: Ambiguous. æmbɪɡjuəs. Open to more than one interpretation; not clear. The instructions were ambiguous and confused everyone.. Her ambiguous response left us unsure of her intentions.

sections.text: Ambiguous
/æmˈbɪɡ.ju.əs/
Open to more than one interpretation; not clear
The instructions were ambiguous and confused everyone.
Her ambiguous response left us unsure of her intentions.

ttsScript: Wander. wɒndər. To walk or move in a leisurely or aimless way. We wandered through the streets of the old city.. Not all those who wander are lost.

sections.text: Wander
/ˈwɒn.dər/
To walk or move in a leisurely or aimless way
We wandered through the streets of the old city.
Not all those who wander are lost.

ttsScript: Breathtaking. breθteɪkɪŋ. Astonishing or awe-inspiring in quality. The sunset over the ocean was absolutely breathtaking.. The mountain scenery was breathtaking at every turn.

sections.text: Breathtaking
/ˈbreθˌteɪ.kɪŋ/
Astonishing or awe-inspiring in quality
The sunset over the ocean was absolutely breathtaking.
The mountain scenery was breathtaking at every turn.

ttsScript: Immerse. ɪmɜːrs. To involve oneself deeply in a particular activity or experience. The best way to learn a language is to immerse yourself in the culture.. She immersed herself in the local traditions during her trip.

sections.text: Immerse
/ɪˈmɜːrs/
To involve oneself deeply in a particular activity or experience
The best way to learn a language is to immerse yourself in the culture.
She immersed herself in the local traditions during her trip.

ttsScript: Exotic. ɪɡzɒtɪk. Originating in or characteristic of a distant foreign country; strikingly unusual. The market was filled with exotic spices and colorful fabrics.. They visited exotic islands in Southeast Asia.

sections.text: Exotic
/ɪɡˈzɒt.ɪk/
Originating in or characteristic of a distant foreign country; strikingly unusual
The market was filled with exotic spices and colorful fabrics.
They visited exotic islands in Southeast Asia.

ttsScript: Heritage. herɪtɪdʒ. Valued objects and traditions passed down through generations. The city is proud of its rich cultural heritage.. These ancient ruins are part of our shared heritage.

sections.text: Heritage
/ˈher.ɪ.tɪdʒ/
Valued objects and traditions passed down through generations
The city is proud of its rich cultural heritage.
These ancient ruins are part of our shared heritage.

ttsScript: Itinerary. aɪtɪnərəri. A planned route or journey; a detailed travel schedule. Our itinerary includes visits to three countries in two weeks.. Check the itinerary for the departure time.

sections.text: Itinerary
/aɪˈtɪn.ər.ər.i/
A planned route or journey; a detailed travel schedule
Our itinerary includes visits to three countries in two weeks.
Check the itinerary for the departure time.

ttsScript: Souvenir. suːvənɪr. A thing that is kept as a reminder of a person, place, or event. She bought a souvenir magnet from every country she visited.. This photo is the best souvenir from our vacation.

sections.text: Souvenir
/ˌsuː.vəˈnɪr/
A thing that is kept as a reminder of a person, place, or event
She bought a souvenir magnet from every country she visited.
This photo is the best souvenir from our vacation.

ttsScript: Picturesque. pɪktʃəresk. Visually attractive, especially in a quaint or charming way. The picturesque village looked like something from a fairy tale.. We drove through picturesque countryside on our way to the coast.

sections.text: Picturesque
/ˌpɪk.tʃərˈesk/
Visually attractive, especially in a quaint or charming way
The picturesque village looked like something from a fairy tale.
We drove through picturesque countryside on our way to the coast.

ttsScript: Expedition. ekspɪdɪʃən. A journey undertaken by a group for a particular purpose, especially exploration. The expedition to the South Pole lasted three months.. They organized an expedition to study the rainforest.

sections.text: Expedition
/ˌek.spɪˈdɪʃ.ən/
A journey undertaken by a group for a particular purpose, especially exploration
The expedition to the South Pole lasted three months.
They organized an expedition to study the rainforest.

ttsScript: Hospitality. hɒspɪtælɪti. The friendly and generous reception and entertainment of guests. The hospitality of the local people made our trip unforgettable.. Japanese hospitality is known worldwide for its attention to detail.

sections.text: Hospitality
/ˌhɒs.pɪˈtæl.ɪ.ti/
The friendly and generous reception and entertainment of guests
The hospitality of the local people made our trip unforgettable.
Japanese hospitality is known worldwide for its attention to detail.

ttsScript: Algorithm. ælɡərɪðəm. A set of rules or steps used to solve a problem or perform a task. Social media platforms use algorithms to decide what content you see.. The search algorithm was optimized for speed.

sections.text: Algorithm
/ˈæl.ɡə.rɪð.əm/
A set of rules or steps used to solve a problem or perform a task
Social media platforms use algorithms to decide what content you see.
The search algorithm was optimized for speed.

ttsScript: Obsolete. ɒbsəliːt. No longer produced or used; out of date. Floppy disks have become completely obsolete.. New technology made the old system obsolete overnight.

sections.text: Obsolete
/ˈɒb.sə.liːt/
No longer produced or used; out of date
Floppy disks have become completely obsolete.
New technology made the old system obsolete overnight.

ttsScript: Encryption. ɪnkrɪpʃən. The process of converting information into a code to prevent unauthorized access. End-to-end encryption keeps your messages private.. The file was protected with strong encryption.

sections.text: Encryption
/ɪnˈkrɪp.ʃən/
The process of converting information into a code to prevent unauthorized access
End-to-end encryption keeps your messages private.
The file was protected with strong encryption.

ttsScript: Seamless. siːmləs. Smooth and continuous, with no apparent gaps or spaces. The app provides a seamless user experience across all devices.. The transition between scenes was seamless.

sections.text: Seamless
/ˈsiːm.ləs/
Smooth and continuous, with no apparent gaps or spaces
The app provides a seamless user experience across all devices.
The transition between scenes was seamless.

ttsScript: Autonomous. ɔːtɒnəməs. Acting independently or having the freedom to do so. Autonomous vehicles can drive without human input.. The robot makes autonomous decisions based on sensor data.

sections.text: Autonomous
/ɔːˈtɒn.ə.məs/
Acting independently or having the freedom to do so
Autonomous vehicles can drive without human input.
The robot makes autonomous decisions based on sensor data.

ttsScript: Bandwidth. bændwɪdθ. The capacity for data transfer; also used informally to mean available time or energy. We need more bandwidth to stream high-quality video.. I don't have the bandwidth to take on another project right now.

sections.text: Bandwidth
/ˈbænd.wɪdθ/
The capacity for data transfer; also used informally to mean available time or energy
We need more bandwidth to stream high-quality video.
I don't have the bandwidth to take on another project right now.

ttsScript: Disruptive. dɪsrʌptɪv. Causing or tending to cause a major change or break in an existing system. Streaming services were disruptive to the traditional TV industry.. The company is known for its disruptive approach to innovation.

sections.text: Disruptive
/dɪsˈrʌp.tɪv/
Causing or tending to cause a major change or break in an existing system
Streaming services were disruptive to the traditional TV industry.
The company is known for its disruptive approach to innovation.

ttsScript: Scalable. skeɪləbəl. Able to be changed in size or scale; able to grow without breaking. We need a scalable solution that works for 100 or 100,000 users.. Cloud computing makes it easy to build scalable applications.

sections.text: Scalable
/ˈskeɪ.lə.bəl/
Able to be changed in size or scale; able to grow without breaking
We need a scalable solution that works for 100 or 100,000 users.
Cloud computing makes it easy to build scalable applications.

ttsScript: Latency. leɪtənsi. The delay before a transfer of data begins following an instruction. Low latency is essential for online gaming.. The new network reduced latency by 50 percent.

sections.text: Latency
/ˈleɪ.tən.si/
The delay before a transfer of data begins following an instruction
Low latency is essential for online gaming.
The new network reduced latency by 50 percent.

ttsScript: Ubiquitous. juːbɪkwɪtəs. Present, appearing, or found everywhere. Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern life.. Coffee shops are ubiquitous in most major cities.

sections.text: Ubiquitous
/juːˈbɪk.wɪ.təs/
Present, appearing, or found everywhere
Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern life.
Coffee shops are ubiquitous in most major cities.

ttsScript: Nourish. nʌrɪʃ. To provide with the food or substances necessary for growth and health. A balanced diet nourishes both body and mind.. Reading good books nourishes the soul.

sections.text: Nourish
/ˈnʌr.ɪʃ/
To provide with the food or substances necessary for growth and health
A balanced diet nourishes both body and mind.
Reading good books nourishes the soul.

ttsScript: Fatigue. fətiːɡ. Extreme tiredness resulting from physical or mental effort. Mental fatigue can be just as debilitating as physical exhaustion.. Chronic fatigue affects millions of people worldwide.

sections.text: Fatigue
/fəˈtiːɡ/
Extreme tiredness resulting from physical or mental effort
Mental fatigue can be just as debilitating as physical exhaustion.
Chronic fatigue affects millions of people worldwide.

ttsScript: Mindful. maɪndfəl. Conscious or aware of something; focusing on the present moment. Being mindful of your breathing can reduce stress.. She practiced mindful eating to enjoy her meals more fully.

sections.text: Mindful
/ˈmaɪnd.fəl/
Conscious or aware of something; focusing on the present moment
Being mindful of your breathing can reduce stress.
She practiced mindful eating to enjoy her meals more fully.

ttsScript: Chronic. krɒnɪk. Persisting for a long time or constantly recurring. Chronic stress can lead to serious health problems.. She has been dealing with chronic back pain for years.

sections.text: Chronic
/ˈkrɒn.ɪk/
Persisting for a long time or constantly recurring
Chronic stress can lead to serious health problems.
She has been dealing with chronic back pain for years.

ttsScript: Rejuvenate. rɪdʒuːvɪneɪt. To make someone or something look or feel younger, fresher, or more lively. A good night of sleep can rejuvenate both body and mind.. The spa treatment was designed to rejuvenate tired skin.

sections.text: Rejuvenate
/rɪˈdʒuː.vɪ.neɪt/
To make someone or something look or feel younger, fresher, or more lively
A good night of sleep can rejuvenate both body and mind.
The spa treatment was designed to rejuvenate tired skin.

ttsScript: Symptom. sɪmptəm. A physical or mental sign indicating a condition or disease. A persistent cough is a common symptom of the flu.. Headaches can be a symptom of dehydration.

sections.text: Symptom
/ˈsɪmp.təm/
A physical or mental sign indicating a condition or disease
A persistent cough is a common symptom of the flu.
Headaches can be a symptom of dehydration.

ttsScript: Holistic. hoʊlɪstɪk. Relating to the whole of something, rather than just a part. A holistic approach to health considers mind, body, and spirit.. The doctor recommended a holistic treatment plan.

sections.text: Holistic
/hoʊˈlɪs.tɪk/
Relating to the whole of something, rather than just a part
A holistic approach to health considers mind, body, and spirit.
The doctor recommended a holistic treatment plan.

ttsScript: Detox. diːtɒks. A process of removing toxic substances from the body. She went on a digital detox and avoided screens for a week.. Drinking plenty of water helps your body detox naturally.

sections.text: Detox
/ˈdiː.tɒks/
A process of removing toxic substances from the body
She went on a digital detox and avoided screens for a week.
Drinking plenty of water helps your body detox naturally.

ttsScript: Immunity. ɪmjuːnɪti. The body's ability to resist infection and disease. Regular exercise helps boost your immunity.. Vaccines work by building immunity against specific diseases.

sections.text: Immunity
/ɪˈmjuː.nɪ.ti/
The body's ability to resist infection and disease
Regular exercise helps boost your immunity.
Vaccines work by building immunity against specific diseases.

ttsScript: Stamina. stæmɪnə. The ability to sustain prolonged physical or mental effort. Marathon runners need incredible stamina.. You can build mental stamina through consistent practice.

sections.text: Stamina
/ˈstæm.ɪ.nə/
The ability to sustain prolonged physical or mental effort
Marathon runners need incredible stamina.
You can build mental stamina through consistent practice.

ttsScript: Sustainable. səsteɪnəbəl. Able to be maintained at a certain rate without depleting natural resources. We need to find sustainable sources of energy.. Sustainable fashion aims to reduce waste in the clothing industry.

sections.text: Sustainable
/səˈsteɪ.nə.bəl/
Able to be maintained at a certain rate without depleting natural resources
We need to find sustainable sources of energy.
Sustainable fashion aims to reduce waste in the clothing industry.

ttsScript: Biodiversity. baɪoʊdaɪvɜːrsɪti. The variety of plant and animal life in a particular habitat. The Amazon rainforest is known for its incredible biodiversity.. Loss of biodiversity threatens the stability of ecosystems.

sections.text: Biodiversity
/ˌbaɪ.oʊ.daɪˈvɜːr.sɪ.ti/
The variety of plant and animal life in a particular habitat
The Amazon rainforest is known for its incredible biodiversity.
Loss of biodiversity threatens the stability of ecosystems.

ttsScript: Pristine. prɪstiːn. In its original condition; unspoiled and clean. The beach was pristine, with crystal-clear water and white sand.. They explored a pristine forest untouched by humans.

sections.text: Pristine
/ˈprɪs.tiːn/
In its original condition; unspoiled and clean
The beach was pristine, with crystal-clear water and white sand.
They explored a pristine forest untouched by humans.

ttsScript: Ecosystem. iːkoʊsɪstəm. A community of living organisms interacting with their environment. Coral reefs are fragile ecosystems that support thousands of species.. Pollution is disrupting the ecosystem of the lake.

sections.text: Ecosystem
/ˈiː.koʊˌsɪs.təm/
A community of living organisms interacting with their environment
Coral reefs are fragile ecosystems that support thousands of species.
Pollution is disrupting the ecosystem of the lake.

ttsScript: Drought. draʊt. A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to a shortage of water. The severe drought destroyed crops across the region.. California has experienced several devastating droughts.

sections.text: Drought
/draʊt/
A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to a shortage of water
The severe drought destroyed crops across the region.
California has experienced several devastating droughts.

ttsScript: Flourish. flʌrɪʃ. To grow or develop in a healthy or vigorous way. Wildflowers flourish in the spring after winter rains.. The garden flourished under her careful attention.

sections.text: Flourish
/ˈflʌr.ɪʃ/
To grow or develop in a healthy or vigorous way
Wildflowers flourish in the spring after winter rains.
The garden flourished under her careful attention.

ttsScript: Erosion. ɪroʊʒən. The gradual wearing away of rock, soil, or land by natural forces. Coastal erosion is threatening homes near the cliffs.. Planting trees helps prevent soil erosion.

sections.text: Erosion
/ɪˈroʊ.ʒən/
The gradual wearing away of rock, soil, or land by natural forces
Coastal erosion is threatening homes near the cliffs.
Planting trees helps prevent soil erosion.

ttsScript: Habitat. hæbɪtæt. The natural home or environment of an animal, plant, or organism. Deforestation is destroying the natural habitat of many species.. The zoo tries to recreate each animal's natural habitat.

sections.text: Habitat
/ˈhæb.ɪ.tæt/
The natural home or environment of an animal, plant, or organism
Deforestation is destroying the natural habitat of many species.
The zoo tries to recreate each animal's natural habitat.

ttsScript: Renewable. rɪnjuːəbəl. A natural resource that is not depleted when used; can be replenished. Solar and wind power are renewable sources of energy.. The country aims to get 80% of its power from renewable sources.

sections.text: Renewable
/rɪˈnjuː.ə.bəl/
A natural resource that is not depleted when used; can be replenished
Solar and wind power are renewable sources of energy.
The country aims to get 80% of its power from renewable sources.

ttsScript: Catastrophe. kətæstrəfi. An event causing great and sudden damage or suffering; a disaster. The oil spill was an environmental catastrophe.. Scientists warn that climate change could lead to catastrophe.

sections.text: Catastrophe
/kəˈtæs.trə.fi/
An event causing great and sudden damage or suffering; a disaster
The oil spill was an environmental catastrophe.
Scientists warn that climate change could lead to catastrophe.

ttsScript: Compromise. kɒmprəmaɪz. An agreement reached by each side making concessions. A good relationship requires compromise from both sides.. They reached a compromise after hours of discussion.

sections.text: Compromise
/ˈkɒm.prə.maɪz/
An agreement reached by each side making concessions
A good relationship requires compromise from both sides.
They reached a compromise after hours of discussion.

ttsScript: Trustworthy. trʌstwɜːrði. Able to be relied on as honest or truthful. She is one of the most trustworthy people I know.. A trustworthy friend keeps your secrets safe.

sections.text: Trustworthy
/ˈtrʌstˌwɜːr.ði/
Able to be relied on as honest or truthful
She is one of the most trustworthy people I know.
A trustworthy friend keeps your secrets safe.

ttsScript: Vulnerable. vʌlnərəbəl. Open to being emotionally or physically hurt; exposed to harm. Being vulnerable in a relationship builds deeper trust.. Children are especially vulnerable to online risks.

sections.text: Vulnerable
/ˈvʌl.nər.ə.bəl/
Open to being emotionally or physically hurt; exposed to harm
Being vulnerable in a relationship builds deeper trust.
Children are especially vulnerable to online risks.

ttsScript: Reconcile. rekənsaɪl. To restore friendly relations after a conflict or disagreement. After years apart, the two friends finally reconciled.. It took time to reconcile their differences.

sections.text: Reconcile
/ˈrek.ən.saɪl/
To restore friendly relations after a conflict or disagreement
After years apart, the two friends finally reconciled.
It took time to reconcile their differences.

ttsScript: Boundary. baʊndəri. A limit that defines what is acceptable behavior in a relationship. Setting healthy boundaries is essential for self-care.. She learned to set clear boundaries at work.

sections.text: Boundary
/ˈbaʊn.dər.i/
A limit that defines what is acceptable behavior in a relationship
Setting healthy boundaries is essential for self-care.
She learned to set clear boundaries at work.

ttsScript: Affection. əfekʃən. A gentle feeling of fondness or liking. He showed his affection by always remembering small details.. A simple hug can express deep affection.

sections.text: Affection
/əˈfek.ʃən/
A gentle feeling of fondness or liking
He showed his affection by always remembering small details.
A simple hug can express deep affection.

ttsScript: Betrayal. bɪtreɪəl. The action of being disloyal to someone who trusts you. The betrayal of his closest friend left him devastated.. Betrayal in a relationship is one of the hardest things to forgive.

sections.text: Betrayal
/bɪˈtreɪ.əl/
The action of being disloyal to someone who trusts you
The betrayal of his closest friend left him devastated.
Betrayal in a relationship is one of the hardest things to forgive.

ttsScript: Cherish. tʃerɪʃ. To protect and care for someone lovingly; to hold dear. I will always cherish the memories we made together.. She cherished every moment with her grandmother.

sections.text: Cherish
/ˈtʃer.ɪʃ/
To protect and care for someone lovingly; to hold dear
I will always cherish the memories we made together.
She cherished every moment with her grandmother.

ttsScript: Platonic. plətɒnɪk. A close relationship that is intimate and affectionate but not romantic. They have a deep platonic friendship that has lasted decades.. Platonic love can be just as meaningful as romantic love.

sections.text: Platonic
/pləˈtɒn.ɪk/
A close relationship that is intimate and affectionate but not romantic
They have a deep platonic friendship that has lasted decades.
Platonic love can be just as meaningful as romantic love.

ttsScript: Devotion. dɪvoʊʃən. Love, loyalty, or enthusiasm for a person, activity, or cause. Her devotion to her family is truly inspiring.. The teacher's devotion to her students changed many lives.

sections.text: Devotion
/dɪˈvoʊ.ʃən/
Love, loyalty, or enthusiasm for a person, activity, or cause
Her devotion to her family is truly inspiring.
The teacher's devotion to her students changed many lives.

ttsScript: Aesthetic. esθetɪk. Concerned with beauty or the appreciation of beauty. The building has a minimalist aesthetic that appeals to modern tastes.. She has a strong aesthetic sense when it comes to interior design.

sections.text: Aesthetic
/esˈθet.ɪk/
Concerned with beauty or the appreciation of beauty
The building has a minimalist aesthetic that appeals to modern tastes.
She has a strong aesthetic sense when it comes to interior design.

ttsScript: Inspire. ɪnspaɪər. To fill someone with the urge or ability to do or feel something creative. Great art has the power to inspire people across generations.. Her story inspired me to start writing my own book.

sections.text: Inspire
/ɪnˈspaɪər/
To fill someone with the urge or ability to do or feel something creative
Great art has the power to inspire people across generations.
Her story inspired me to start writing my own book.

ttsScript: Ephemeral. ɪfemərəl. Lasting for a very short time. The ephemeral beauty of cherry blossoms draws millions of visitors.. Street art is often ephemeral, lasting only until the next rain.

sections.text: Ephemeral
/ɪˈfem.ər.əl/
Lasting for a very short time
The ephemeral beauty of cherry blossoms draws millions of visitors.
Street art is often ephemeral, lasting only until the next rain.

ttsScript: Masterpiece. mɑːstərpiːs. A work of outstanding artistry, skill, or workmanship. The Mona Lisa is considered Leonardo da Vinci's masterpiece.. Every chef dreams of creating a culinary masterpiece.

sections.text: Masterpiece
/ˈmɑːs.tər.piːs/
A work of outstanding artistry, skill, or workmanship
The Mona Lisa is considered Leonardo da Vinci's masterpiece.
Every chef dreams of creating a culinary masterpiece.

ttsScript: Nuance. njuːɑːns. A subtle difference in meaning, expression, or sound. She captured every nuance of emotion in her performance.. Understanding cultural nuances is key to effective communication.

sections.text: Nuance
/ˈnjuː.ɑːns/
A subtle difference in meaning, expression, or sound
She captured every nuance of emotion in her performance.
Understanding cultural nuances is key to effective communication.

ttsScript: Versatile. vɜːrsətaɪl. Able to adapt or be adapted to many different functions or activities. She is a versatile musician who can play five instruments.. The versatile fabric works for both casual and formal wear.

sections.text: Versatile
/ˈvɜːr.sə.taɪl/
Able to adapt or be adapted to many different functions or activities
She is a versatile musician who can play five instruments.
The versatile fabric works for both casual and formal wear.

ttsScript: Evocative. ɪvɒkətɪv. Bringing strong images, memories, or feelings to mind. The evocative music transported the audience to another era.. Her painting is deeply evocative of summer in the countryside.

sections.text: Evocative
/ɪˈvɒk.ə.tɪv/
Bringing strong images, memories, or feelings to mind
The evocative music transported the audience to another era.
Her painting is deeply evocative of summer in the countryside.

ttsScript: Curate. kjʊreɪt. To select, organize, and present content or items carefully. She curated an impressive collection of contemporary art.. The playlist was carefully curated for the perfect road trip.

sections.text: Curate
/kjʊˈreɪt/
To select, organize, and present content or items carefully
She curated an impressive collection of contemporary art.
The playlist was carefully curated for the perfect road trip.

ttsScript: Whimsical. wɪmzɪkəl. Playfully quaint or fanciful, especially in an appealing way. The garden had a whimsical design with fairy lights and sculptures.. His whimsical illustrations delight both children and adults.

sections.text: Whimsical
/ˈwɪm.zɪ.kəl/
Playfully quaint or fanciful, especially in an appealing way
The garden had a whimsical design with fairy lights and sculptures.
His whimsical illustrations delight both children and adults.

ttsScript: Eloquent. eləkwənt. Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing. She delivered an eloquent speech that moved the entire audience.. His eloquent writing style makes complex topics accessible.

sections.text: Eloquent
/ˈel.ə.kwənt/
Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing
She delivered an eloquent speech that moved the entire audience.
His eloquent writing style makes complex topics accessible.

ttsScript: Existential. eɡzɪstenʃəl. Relating to human existence and the meaning of life. Climate change poses an existential threat to island nations.. He went through an existential crisis in his thirties.

sections.text: Existential
/ˌeɡ.zɪˈsten.ʃəl/
Relating to human existence and the meaning of life
Climate change poses an existential threat to island nations.
He went through an existential crisis in his thirties.

ttsScript: Ephemeral. ɪfemərəl. Lasting for a very short time. Fame on the internet is often ephemeral.. The ephemeral nature of life makes every moment precious.

sections.text: Ephemeral
/ɪˈfem.ər.əl/
Lasting for a very short time
Fame on the internet is often ephemeral.
The ephemeral nature of life makes every moment precious.

ttsScript: Dichotomy. daɪkɒtəmi. A division or contrast between two things that are completely different. There is a false dichotomy between art and science.. The dichotomy between rich and poor continues to grow.

sections.text: Dichotomy
/daɪˈkɒt.ə.mi/
A division or contrast between two things that are completely different
There is a false dichotomy between art and science.
The dichotomy between rich and poor continues to grow.

ttsScript: Intrinsic. ɪntrɪnzɪk. Belonging naturally; essential and inherent. Curiosity is an intrinsic part of human nature.. The intrinsic value of education goes beyond getting a job.

sections.text: Intrinsic
/ɪnˈtrɪn.zɪk/
Belonging naturally; essential and inherent
Curiosity is an intrinsic part of human nature.
The intrinsic value of education goes beyond getting a job.

ttsScript: Transcend. trænsend. To go beyond the range or limits of something. Great music has the ability to transcend language barriers.. Her achievements transcend what anyone thought was possible.

sections.text: Transcend
/trænˈsend/
To go beyond the range or limits of something
Great music has the ability to transcend language barriers.
Her achievements transcend what anyone thought was possible.

ttsScript: Altruism. æltruɪzəm. The selfless concern for the well-being of others. True altruism means helping others without expecting anything in return.. Acts of altruism can create a ripple effect in communities.

sections.text: Altruism
/ˈæl.tru.ɪ.zəm/
The selfless concern for the well-being of others
True altruism means helping others without expecting anything in return.
Acts of altruism can create a ripple effect in communities.

ttsScript: Pragmatic. præɡmætɪk. Dealing with things sensibly and realistically rather than ideally. We need a pragmatic approach to solving this problem.. She is a pragmatic leader who focuses on what works.

sections.text: Pragmatic
/præɡˈmæt.ɪk/
Dealing with things sensibly and realistically rather than ideally
We need a pragmatic approach to solving this problem.
She is a pragmatic leader who focuses on what works.

ttsScript: Resilience. rɪzɪliəns. The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; mental toughness. Resilience is not about never falling, but about getting back up.. The community showed incredible resilience after the disaster.

sections.text: Resilience
/rɪˈzɪl.i.əns/
The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; mental toughness
Resilience is not about never falling, but about getting back up.
The community showed incredible resilience after the disaster.

ttsScript: Enigma. ɪnɪɡmə. A person or thing that is mysterious, puzzling, or difficult to understand. The disappearance remains an enigma to this day.. She was an enigma — brilliant but impossible to predict.

sections.text: Enigma
/ɪˈnɪɡ.mə/
A person or thing that is mysterious, puzzling, or difficult to understand
The disappearance remains an enigma to this day.
She was an enigma — brilliant but impossible to predict.

ttsScript: Juxtapose. dʒʌkstəpoʊz. To place two things side by side for comparison or contrast. The artist juxtaposed light and dark to create a powerful effect.. The documentary juxtaposes wealth and poverty in the same city.

sections.text: Juxtapose
/ˌdʒʌk.stəˈpoʊz/
To place two things side by side for comparison or contrast
The artist juxtaposed light and dark to create a powerful effect.
The documentary juxtaposes wealth and poverty in the same city.

ttsScript: Savory. seɪvəri. Having a salty or spicy flavor rather than a sweet one. The restaurant is known for its savory dishes and bold flavors.. I prefer savory snacks over sweet ones.

sections.text: Savory
/ˈseɪ.vər.i/
Having a salty or spicy flavor rather than a sweet one
The restaurant is known for its savory dishes and bold flavors.
I prefer savory snacks over sweet ones.

ttsScript: Appetite. æpɪtaɪt. A natural desire to satisfy a bodily need, especially for food. Exercise usually increases your appetite.. She has a big appetite for learning new things.

sections.text: Appetite
/ˈæp.ɪ.taɪt/
A natural desire to satisfy a bodily need, especially for food
Exercise usually increases your appetite.
She has a big appetite for learning new things.

ttsScript: Cuisine. kwɪziːn. A style or method of cooking, especially associated with a particular country. Japanese cuisine is admired for its balance and presentation.. The city offers a diverse range of international cuisines.

sections.text: Cuisine
/kwɪˈziːn/
A style or method of cooking, especially associated with a particular country
Japanese cuisine is admired for its balance and presentation.
The city offers a diverse range of international cuisines.

ttsScript: Gourmet. ɡʊərmeɪ. Of high quality and sophistication in food and drink. The hotel offers a gourmet dining experience.. She turned simple ingredients into a gourmet meal.

sections.text: Gourmet
/ɡʊərˈmeɪ/
Of high quality and sophistication in food and drink
The hotel offers a gourmet dining experience.
She turned simple ingredients into a gourmet meal.

ttsScript: Garnish. ɡɑːrnɪʃ. To decorate or embellish food with a small amount of another food. Garnish the soup with fresh herbs before serving.. The dessert was garnished with edible flowers.

sections.text: Garnish
/ˈɡɑːr.nɪʃ/
To decorate or embellish food with a small amount of another food
Garnish the soup with fresh herbs before serving.
The dessert was garnished with edible flowers.

ttsScript: Delicacy. delɪkəsi. A type of food considered to be especially rare or luxurious. Sushi-grade tuna is considered a delicacy in many countries.. The local delicacy is a spiced lamb stew served with flatbread.

sections.text: Delicacy
/ˈdel.ɪ.kə.si/
A type of food considered to be especially rare or luxurious
Sushi-grade tuna is considered a delicacy in many countries.
The local delicacy is a spiced lamb stew served with flatbread.

ttsScript: Aromatic. ærəmætɪk. Having a pleasant and distinctive smell. The kitchen was filled with the aromatic scent of fresh bread.. Aromatic herbs like basil and rosemary transform any dish.

sections.text: Aromatic
/ˌær.əˈmæt.ɪk/
Having a pleasant and distinctive smell
The kitchen was filled with the aromatic scent of fresh bread.
Aromatic herbs like basil and rosemary transform any dish.

ttsScript: Bland. blænd. Lacking strong features or flavor; not stimulating. The food was bland and needed more seasoning.. Hospital food has a reputation for being bland.

sections.text: Bland
/blænd/
Lacking strong features or flavor; not stimulating
The food was bland and needed more seasoning.
Hospital food has a reputation for being bland.

ttsScript: Indulge. ɪndʌldʒ. To allow oneself to enjoy the pleasure of something. She decided to indulge in a slice of chocolate cake.. It's okay to indulge once in a while.

sections.text: Indulge
/ɪnˈdʌldʒ/
To allow oneself to enjoy the pleasure of something
She decided to indulge in a slice of chocolate cake.
It's okay to indulge once in a while.

ttsScript: Palate. pælɪt. A person's ability to distinguish between and appreciate different flavors. A wine sommelier has a highly developed palate.. The dish was designed to satisfy every palate.

sections.text: Palate
/ˈpæl.ɪt/
A person's ability to distinguish between and appreciate different flavors
A wine sommelier has a highly developed palate.
The dish was designed to satisfy every palate.
